import YData_baseball

YData_baseball.download_data("Lahman_2025/Teams.csv")
YData_baseball.download_data("Lahman_2025/People.csv")  
YData_baseball.download_data("Lahman_2025/Batting.csv") 
YData_baseball.download_data("Lahman_2025/Pitching.csv") 

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
from scipy.stats import binom
import statsmodels.formula.api as smf 

teams = pd.read_csv('Teams.csv')
people = pd.read_csv('People.csv')
batting = pd.read_csv('Batting.csv')
pitching = pd.read_csv('Pitching.csv')
batting_2025 = pd.read_csv("Batting_2025.csv")
pitching_2025 = pd.read_csv("Pitching_2025.csv")

The file `Pitching.csv` already exists.

def get_rmse(the_data, y_col, x_col):
    text = y_col + '~' + x_col
    lm = smf.ols(text, data = the_data).fit()
    the_params = lm.params

    
    # now I'll use a line that allows for multiple x columns (using online research)
    predictions = the_params['Intercept'] + (the_data * the_params.drop('Intercept')).sum(axis=1)

    residuals = the_data[y_col] - predictions

    mse = np.mean(residuals ** 2)

    rmse = np.sqrt(mse)

    return(rmse)

def get_corrcoef(the_df, x_col_name, y_col_name):
    corr_matrix = np.corrcoef(the_df[x_col_name], the_df[y_col_name])
    corr_value = round(corr_matrix[0,1], 3)
    return corr_value

from pybaseball import bwar_bat

# Get all player WAR data from Baseball Reference
war_data = bwar_bat()

war_data = war_data.rename(columns={
    "player_ID": "playerID",
    "year_ID": "yearID"
})

merged_df = batting_2025.merge(
    war_data[['playerID', 'yearID', 'WAR']],
    on=['playerID', 'yearID'],
    how='left'
)

team_war = merged_df.groupby(['yearID', 'teamID'], as_index=False)['WAR'].sum().fillna(0)

teams_df = pd.read_csv(
    "https://vincentarelbundock.github.io/Rdatasets/csv/Lahman/Teams.csv"
)


team_wins = teams[['yearID', 'teamID', 'W', 'G']]

final_df = team_war.merge(
    team_wins,
    on=['yearID', 'teamID'],
    how='left'
)

final_df["war_per_game"] = final_df["WAR"] / final_df["G"]
final_df["wins_per_game"] = final_df["W"] / final_df["G"]

from pybaseball import bwar_pitch

# Get all player WAR data from Baseball Reference
pitch_war_data = bwar_pitch()

pitch_war_data.head()

pitch_war_data = pitch_war_data.rename(columns={
    "player_ID": "playerID",
    "year_ID": "yearID"
})

pitch_merged_df = pitching_2025.merge(
    pitch_war_data[['playerID', 'yearID', 'WAR']],
    on=['playerID', 'yearID'],
    how='left'
)

team_pitch_war = pitch_merged_df.groupby(['yearID', 'teamID'], as_index=False)['WAR'].sum().fillna(0)

final_pitch_df = team_pitch_war.merge(
    team_wins,
    on=['yearID', 'teamID'],
    how='left'
)

final_pitch_df["war_per_game"] = final_pitch_df["WAR"] / final_pitch_df["G"]
final_pitch_df["wins_per_game"] = final_pitch_df["W"] / final_pitch_df["G"]

# playerID function

def get_player_IDs(year):
    batting_2025 = pd.read_csv("Batting_2025.csv")
    pitching_2025 = pd.read_csv("Pitching_2025.csv")

    batting_year = batting_2025[batting_2025["yearID"] == year]
    pitching_year = pitching_2025[pitching_2025["yearID"] == year]
    
    teams = batting_year["teamID"].unique()
    
    all_playerIDs = []

    for team in teams:
        playerIDs = []

        team_batters = batting_year[batting_year["teamID"] == team]
        team_pitchers = pitching_year[pitching_year["teamID"] == team]

        for i in range(len(team_batters)):
            playerID_specific = team_batters.iloc[i]["playerID"]
            all_teams_player = batting_year[batting_year["playerID"] == playerID_specific]
            total_games = all_teams_player["G"].sum()

            if (team_batters.iloc[i]["G"] > ((total_games)/2)):
                playerIDs.append(playerID_specific)

        for i in range(len(team_pitchers)):
            playerID_specific = team_pitchers.iloc[i]["playerID"]
            all_teams_player = pitching_year[pitching_year["playerID"] == playerID_specific]
            total_games = all_teams_player["G"].sum()

            if (team_pitchers.iloc[i]["G"] > ((total_games)/2)):
                playerIDs.append(playerID_specific)

        playerIDs = list(set(playerIDs))

        all_playerIDs.append(playerIDs)

    playerID_df = pd.DataFrame({"teamID": teams, "playerIDs": all_playerIDs})
    
    return playerID_df

def get_previous_war(year, players): # meaning if you input 2023, you get 2022's totals
    batting_war_data = bwar_bat()
    pitching_war_data = bwar_pitch()
    
    batting_war_data = batting_war_data.rename(columns={
    "player_ID": "playerID",
    "year_ID": "yearID"
    })
    pitching_war_data = pitching_war_data.rename(columns={
    "player_ID": "playerID",
    "year_ID": "yearID"
    })

    last_year = year - 1
    
    merged_bat_df = batting_2025.merge(
    batting_war_data[['playerID', 'yearID', 'WAR']],
    on=['playerID', 'yearID'],
    how='left'
    )

    merged_pitch_df = pitching_2025.merge(
    pitching_war_data[['playerID', 'yearID', 'WAR']],
    on=['playerID', 'yearID'],
    how='left'
    )

    smaller_bat_df = merged_bat_df[["playerID", "yearID", "teamID", "G", "WAR"]]

    smaller_pitch_df = merged_pitch_df[["playerID", "yearID", "teamID", "G", "WAR"]]

    combined_df = pd.concat([smaller_bat_df, smaller_pitch_df], ignore_index=True)
    combined_df = combined_df[combined_df["yearID"] == last_year]


    players["WAR"] = np.nan
    # setting this up to add my totals next
    
    for idx, row in players.iterrows():
        total_war = 0
        players_list = row["playerIDs"]

        for player in players_list:
            war = combined_df.loc[
                combined_df["playerID"] == player, "WAR"
            ].sum()
            total_war += war

        players.loc[idx, "WAR"] = total_war

    return_df = players[["teamID", "WAR"]]

    return return_df
        

team_wins = teams[['yearID', 'teamID', 'W', 'G']]
team_wins["wins_per_game"] = team_wins["W"] / team_wins["G"]

/tmp/ipykernel_1025043/1775730794.py:2: SettingWithCopyWarning: 
A value is trying to be set on a copy of a slice from a DataFrame.
Try using .loc[row_indexer,col_indexer] = value instead

See the caveats in the documentation: https://pandas.pydata.org/pandas-docs/stable/user_guide/indexing.html#returning-a-view-versus-a-copy
  team_wins["wins_per_game"] = team_wins["W"] / team_wins["G"]

def plot_war_for_year(year):
    players = get_player_IDs(year)
    war_data = get_previous_war(year, players)

    team_wins = teams[['yearID', 'teamID', 'W', 'G']].copy()
    team_wins_year = team_wins[team_wins["yearID"] == year].copy()

    final_df = war_data.merge(team_wins_year, on="teamID", how="left")
    final_df["war_per_game"] = final_df["WAR"] / final_df["G"]
    final_df["wins_per_game"] = final_df["W"] / final_df["G"]

    corr_coef = get_corrcoef(final_df, "war_per_game", "wins_per_game")
    lm = smf.ols("wins_per_game ~ war_per_game", data = final_df).fit()

    the_params = lm.params

    war_values = pd.DataFrame({"war_per_game": np.arange(min(final_df["war_per_game"]), max(final_df["war_per_game"]) + 0.01)})

    win_predictions = lm.predict(war_values)
    plt.figure()
    plt.scatter(data=final_df, x="war_per_game", y="wins_per_game", alpha = 0.5);
    plt.title(f"MLB {year} wins per game vs. {year - 1}'s WAR per game");
    plt.plot(war_values["war_per_game"], win_predictions, color = "red", label = f"r of {corr_coef}");
    plt.show()

def get_war_wins_for_year(year):
    players = get_player_IDs(year)
    war_data = get_previous_war(year, players)


    team_wins = teams[['yearID', 'teamID', 'W', 'G']].copy()
    team_wins_year = team_wins[team_wins["yearID"] == year].copy()

    final_df = war_data.merge(team_wins_year, on="teamID", how="left")
    final_df["war_per_game"] = final_df["WAR"] / final_df["G"]
    final_df["wins_per_game"] = final_df["W"] / final_df["G"]
    final_df["season"] = year

    return final_df


def plot_war_for_range(start_year, end_year):
    all_dfs = []

    for year in range(start_year, end_year + 1):
        year_df = get_war_wins_for_year(year)
        all_dfs.append(year_df)

    combined_df = pd.concat(all_dfs, ignore_index=True)

    corr_coef = get_corrcoef(combined_df, "war_per_game", "wins_per_game")
    lm = smf.ols("wins_per_game ~ war_per_game", data=combined_df).fit()

    war_values = pd.DataFrame({
        "war_per_game": np.arange(
            combined_df["war_per_game"].min(),
            combined_df["war_per_game"].max() + 0.01,
            0.01
        )
    })

    win_predictions = lm.predict(war_values)

    plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
    plt.scatter(
        data=combined_df,
        x="war_per_game",
        y="wins_per_game",
        alpha=0.5
    )
    plt.plot(
        war_values["war_per_game"],
        win_predictions,
        color="red",
        label=f"r = {corr_coef:.3f}"
    )
    plt.title(f"MLB wins per game vs. previous season WAR per game ({start_year}-{end_year})")
    plt.xlabel("Previous season WAR per game")
    plt.ylabel("Current season wins per game")
    plt.legend()
    plt.show()

    return combined_df

plot_war_for_year(2024)

plot_war_for_year(2023)

def get_war_for_range(start_year, end_year):
    all_dfs = []

    for year in range(start_year, end_year + 1):
        year_df = get_war_wins_for_year(year)
        all_dfs.append(year_df)

    combined_df = pd.concat(all_dfs, ignore_index=True)
    
    return combined_df

teams_wins = teams[["yearID", "teamID", "W", "G"]]

teams_wins_last_year = teams_wins.copy()

teams_wins_last_year["yearID"] = teams_wins_last_year["yearID"] + 1

teams_wins_last_year["win_percentage_last"] = teams_wins_last_year["W"] / teams_wins_last_year["G"]

modern_era_data = modern_era_war_data.merge(teams_wins_last_year[["yearID", "teamID", "win_percentage_last"]], on = ["yearID", "teamID"], how = "left")

the rmse is 0.06267961404596573

modern_era_data = []
modern_era_data = modern_era_war_data.copy()

lm_multiple = smf.ols(formula = "wins_per_game ~ war_per_game + win_percentage_last", data = modern_era_data).fit()

coefficients =  lm_multiple.params

print(coefficients)

Intercept              0.276136
war_per_game           0.135656
win_percentage_last    0.387706
dtype: float64

def get_predictions(year, given_data):
    data = given_data[given_data["yearID"] == year].copy()

    data["predicted_win_pct"] = lm_multiple.predict(data)
    data["residual"] = data["wins_per_game"] - data["predicted_win_pct"]
    data["abs_error"] = abs(data["residual"])

    rmse_data = np.sqrt(np.mean(data["residual"]**2))
    print(rmse_data)

    return data


def graph_predictions(year, given_data):

    # our function that uses lm_multiple.predict to generate data with
    # 'predicted_win_pct', 'residual', and 'abs_error'
    data = get_predictions(year, given_data)

    plt.figure()

    plt.scatter(
        data["predicted_win_pct"],
        data["wins_per_game"],
        alpha=0.7
    )

    min_val = min(data["predicted_win_pct"].min(), data["wins_per_game"].min())
    max_val = max(data["predicted_win_pct"].max(), data["wins_per_game"].max())
    plt.plot([min_val, max_val], [min_val, max_val], linestyle="--")

    plt.xlabel("Predicted Win %")
    plt.ylabel("Actual Win %")
    plt.title(f"{year}: Predicted vs Actual Win %")
    plt.show()

    plt.figure()

    plt.scatter(
        data["predicted_win_pct"],
        data["residual"],
        alpha=0.7
    )

    plt.axhline(0, linestyle="--")

    plt.xlabel("Predicted Win %")
    plt.ylabel("Residual")
    plt.title(f"{year} Residuals")
    plt.show()

graph_predictions(2000, modern_era_data)

0.05360582364307855

def plot_comparisons(year, data_given):
    data = get_predictions(year, data_given)

    data["predicted_wins"] = data.copy()["predicted_win_pct"] * data.copy()["G"]

    data = data.sort_values("wins_per_game") 

    x = np.arange(len(data))

    plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))

    # actual
    plt.scatter(x, data["W"], label="Actual", alpha=0.8)

    # predicted
    plt.scatter(x, data["predicted_wins"], label="Predicted", alpha=0.8)

    plt.xticks(x, data["teamID"], rotation=45)

    plt.ylabel("Wins")
    plt.title(f"{year}: Predicted vs Actual Wins by Team")

    plt.legend()
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()

plot_comparisons(2004, modern_era_data)

0.07215702816123215

modern_era_data.to_csv("mlb_dataset.csv", index=False)

modern_era_data.to_pickle("mlb_dataset.pkl")

# Now that I've developed a method and formula using wins and WAR, 
#I'm going to make a new data frame that includes other previous statistics, such as OPS+

# This will take a bit, but it will create a much better formula.

def add_derived_stats(teams_data):
    
    # batting average: ba
    ba = teams_data['H']/teams_data['AB']

    # create slugging percentage
    x1b = teams_data['H'] - (teams_data['2B'] + teams_data['3B'] + teams_data['HR'])
    slg = (x1b + (2 * teams_data['2B'] + 3 * teams_data['3B'] + 4 * teams_data['HR']))/teams_data['AB']

    # create on-base percentage
    obp = (teams_data['H'] + teams_data['BB'] + teams_data['HBP'])/(teams_data['AB'] + teams_data['BB'] + teams_data['HBP'] + teams_data['SF'])

    # create on-base plus slugging percentage
    ops = obp + slg

    pa = teams_data['AB'] + teams_data['BB'] + teams_data['IBB'] + teams_data['HBP'] + teams_data['SF']

    # create the table that has all the desired statistics
    teams_with_addition_stats = teams_data.copy()
    teams_with_addition_stats["1B"] = x1b
    teams_with_addition_stats["BA"] = ba
    teams_with_addition_stats["SLG"] = slg
    teams_with_addition_stats["OBP"] = obp
    teams_with_addition_stats["OPS"] = ops
    teams_with_addition_stats["PA"] = pa
    
    return teams_with_addition_stats

batting_2025 = add_derived_stats(batting_2025)

def get_previous_batting_counting_stat(stat, year, players):  # if input 2023, gets 2022 totals
    last_year = year - 1

    smaller_bat_df = batting_2025[["playerID", "yearID", "teamID", "PA", stat]].copy()
    smaller_bat_df = smaller_bat_df[smaller_bat_df["yearID"] == last_year]

    players = players.copy()
    players[stat] = np.nan
    players["yearID"] = year

    for idx, row in players.iterrows():
        total_stat = 0
        total_pa = 0
        players_list = row["playerIDs"]

        for player in players_list:
            player_stat = smaller_bat_df.loc[
                smaller_bat_df["playerID"] == player, stat
            ].sum()
            pa_s = smaller_bat_df.loc[
                smaller_bat_df["playerID"] == player, "PA"
            ].sum()

            total_pa += pa_s
            total_stat += player_stat

        if total_pa > 0:
            players.loc[idx, stat] = total_stat / total_pa
        else:
            players.loc[idx, stat] = np.nan

    return_df = players[["teamID", "yearID", stat]]

    return return_df

Hits_2015 = get_previous_batting_counting_stat("H", 2015, get_player_IDs(2015))

Hits_2015.head()
teamID yearID H
0 ATL 2015 0.219312
1 OAK 2015 0.225159
2 CHA 2015 0.237511
3 MIN 2015 0.235121
4 SEA 2015 0.231321 
def get_previous_batting_percentage_stat(stat, year, players):
    last_year = year - 1

    smaller_bat_df = batting_2025[["playerID", "yearID", "teamID", "PA", stat]].copy()
    smaller_bat_df = smaller_bat_df[smaller_bat_df["yearID"] == last_year]

    players = players.copy()
    players[stat] = np.nan
    players["yearID"] = year

    for idx, row in players.iterrows():
        total_stat = 0
        total_pa = 0
        players_list = row["playerIDs"]

        for player in players_list:
            player_stat = smaller_bat_df.loc[
                smaller_bat_df["playerID"] == player, stat
            ].sum()

            pa_s = smaller_bat_df.loc[
                smaller_bat_df["playerID"] == player, "PA"
            ].sum()

            total_stat += player_stat * pa_s 
            total_pa += pa_s

            if total_pa > 0:
                players.loc[idx, stat] = total_stat / total_pa

            else:
                players.loc[idx, stat] = np.nan

    return players[["teamID", "yearID", stat]]

            

OPS_2015 = get_previous_batting_percentage_stat("OPS", 2015, get_player_IDs(2015))

OPS_2015.tail()
teamID yearID OPS

29 WAS 2015 0.709915 
def apply_stat_function_over_years(stat_function, stat, start_year, end_year):
    dfs = []

    for year in range(start_year, end_year + 1):
        players = get_player_IDs(year)
        year_df = stat_function(stat, year, players)
        dfs.append(year_df)

    combined_df = pd.concat(dfs, ignore_index=True)
    return combined_df

# now I'll gather data for OPS, BA, HR, 2B, BB, and R

OPS_data = apply_stat_function_over_years(get_previous_batting_percentage_stat, "OPS", 1975, 2024)

OPS_data = OPS_data.rename(columns={'OPS': 'combined_OPS'})

batting.columns

Index(['playerID', 'yearID', 'stint', 'teamID', 'lgID', 'G', 'G_batting', 'AB',
       'R', 'H', '2B', '3B', 'HR', 'RBI', 'SB', 'CS', 'BB', 'SO', 'IBB', 'HBP',
       'SH', 'SF', 'GIDP', 'G_old', '1B', 'BA', 'SLG', 'OBP', 'OPS', 'PA'],
      dtype='object')
BA_data = apply_stat_function_over_years(get_previous_batting_percentage_stat, "BA", 1975, 2024)

BA_data = BA_data.rename(columns={'BA': 'combined_BA'})

HR_data = apply_stat_function_over_years(get_previous_batting_counting_stat, "HR", 1975, 2024)

HR_data = HR_data.rename(columns={'HR': 'combined_HR'})

X2B_data = apply_stat_function_over_years(get_previous_batting_counting_stat, "2B", 1975, 2024)

X2B_data = X2B_data.rename(columns={'2B': 'combined_2B'})

BB_data = apply_stat_function_over_years(get_previous_batting_counting_stat, "BB", 1975, 2024)

BB_data = BB_data.rename(columns={'BB': 'combined_BB'})

R_data = apply_stat_function_over_years(get_previous_batting_counting_stat, "R", 1975, 2024)

R_data = R_data.rename(columns={'R': 'combined_R'})

 

combined = modern_era_data.merge(OPS_data, on=["teamID", "yearID"], how="inner")
combined = combined.merge(BA_data, on=["teamID", "yearID"], how="inner")
combined = combined.merge(HR_data, on=["teamID", "yearID"], how="inner")
combined = combined.merge(X2B_data, on=["teamID", "yearID"], how="inner")
combined = combined.merge(BB_data, on=["teamID", "yearID"], how="inner")
combined = combined.merge(R_data, on=["teamID", "yearID"], how="inner")

combined = pd.read_csv('final_combined.csv')
combined.head()

print(f"the rmse is {rmse}")

the rmse is 0.06267961404596573

team_stats = []

team_stats = teams.copy()[["yearID", "teamID", "W", "G", "R", "RA", "H", "HR", "ERA"]]

team_stats["yearID"] = team_stats["yearID"] + 1

team_stats["R_per_game_last"] = team_stats["R"] / team_stats["G"]
team_stats["RA_per_game_last"] = team_stats["RA"] / team_stats["G"]
team_stats["H_per_game_last"] = team_stats["H"] / team_stats["G"]
team_stats["HR_per_game_last"] = team_stats["HR"] / team_stats["G"]
team_stats["ERA_last"] = team_stats["ERA"]

rmse = get_rmse(final_combined_games_min, "wins_per_game", "war_per_game + win_percentage_last + R_per_game_last + RA_per_game_last + H_per_game_last + HR_per_game_last + ERA_last + combined_OPS + combined_BA + combined_HR + combined_2B + combined_BB + combined_R")
print(f"the rmse is {rmse}")

the rmse is 0.059307733906716814

final_combined_games_min.to_csv("final_combined.csv", index=False)

lm_multiple = smf.ols(formula = "wins_per_game ~ war_per_game + win_percentage_last + R_per_game_last + RA_per_game_last + H_per_game_last + HR_per_game_last + ERA_last + combined_OPS + combined_BA + combined_HR + combined_2B + combined_BB + combined_R", data = final_combined_games_min).fit()

coefficients =  lm_multiple.params

print(coefficients)

war_2025 = get_war_wins_for_year(2025)
war_2025.head()
teamID WAR yearID W G war_per_game wins_per_game season
0 CIN 29.92 2025 83 162 0.184691 0.512346 2025
1 PHI 46.73 2025 96 162 0.288457 0.592593 2025
2 MIN 27.62 2025 70 162 0.170494 0.432099 2025
3 ARI 39.63 2025 80 162 0.244630 0.493827 2025
4 WAS 29.09 2025 66 162 0.179568 0.407407 2025 
def get_data_for_year(year):
    war_data_year = get_war_wins_for_year(year)

    teams_wins = teams.copy()[["yearID", "teamID", "W", "G"]]

    teams_wins_last_year = teams_wins.copy()

    teams_wins_last_year["yearID"] = teams_wins_last_year["yearID"] + 1

    teams_wins_last_year["win_percentage_last"] = teams_wins_last_year["W"] / teams_wins_last_year["G"]

    year_data_1 = war_data_year.merge(teams_wins_last_year[["yearID", "teamID", "win_percentage_last"]], on = ["yearID", "teamID"], how = "left")
    OPS_data_year = apply_stat_function_over_years(get_previous_batting_percentage_stat, "OPS", year, year)
    OPS_data_year = OPS_data_year.rename(columns={'OPS': 'combined_OPS'})
    BA_data_year = apply_stat_function_over_years(get_previous_batting_percentage_stat, "BA", year, year)
    BA_data_year = BA_data_year.rename(columns={'BA': 'combined_BA'})
    HR_data_year = apply_stat_function_over_years(get_previous_batting_counting_stat, "HR", year, year)
    HR_data_year = HR_data_year.rename(columns={'HR': 'combined_HR'})
    X2B_data_year = apply_stat_function_over_years(get_previous_batting_counting_stat, "2B", year, year)
    X2B_data_year = X2B_data_year.rename(columns={'2B': 'combined_2B'})
    BB_data_year = apply_stat_function_over_years(get_previous_batting_counting_stat, "BB", year, year)
    BB_data_year = BB_data_year.rename(columns={'BB': 'combined_BB'})
    R_data_year = apply_stat_function_over_years(get_previous_batting_counting_stat, "R", year, year)
    R_data_year = R_data_year.rename(columns={'R': 'combined_R'})
    combined = year_data_1.merge(OPS_data_year, on=["teamID", "yearID"], how="inner")
    combined = combined.merge(BA_data_year, on=["teamID", "yearID"], how="inner")
    combined = combined.merge(HR_data_year, on=["teamID", "yearID"], how="inner")
    combined = combined.merge(X2B_data_year, on=["teamID", "yearID"], how="inner")
    combined = combined.merge(BB_data_year, on=["teamID", "yearID"], how="inner")
    combined = combined.merge(R_data_year, on=["teamID", "yearID"], how="inner")

    team_stats = teams.copy()[["yearID", "teamID", "W", "G", "R", "RA", "H", "HR", "ERA"]]

    team_stats["yearID"] = team_stats["yearID"] + 1

    team_stats["R_per_game_last"] = team_stats["R"] / team_stats["G"]
    team_stats["RA_per_game_last"] = team_stats["RA"] / team_stats["G"]
    team_stats["H_per_game_last"] = team_stats["H"] / team_stats["G"]
    team_stats["HR_per_game_last"] = team_stats["HR"] / team_stats["G"]
    team_stats["ERA_last"] = team_stats["ERA"]

    final_combined = combined.merge(team_stats[["yearID", "teamID", "R_per_game_last", "RA_per_game_last", "H_per_game_last", "HR_per_game_last", "ERA_last"]], on = ["yearID", "teamID"], how = "left")

    final_combined_games_min = final_combined.copy()[final_combined["G"] >= 100]

    # now I'm going to add the last two years totals to see if they are helpful... 

    teams_wins = teams.copy()[["yearID", "teamID", "W", "G"]]

    teams_wins["yearID"] = teams_wins["yearID"] + 2

    teams_wins["win_percentage_two_ago"] = teams_wins["W"] / teams_wins["G"]

    final_combined_games_min = final_combined_games_min.merge(teams_wins[["yearID", "teamID", "win_percentage_two_ago"]], on = ["yearID", "teamID"], how = "left")


    teams_wins_2 = teams.copy()[["yearID", "teamID", "W", "G"]]

    teams_wins_2["yearID"] = teams_wins["yearID"] + 3

    teams_wins_2["win_percentage_three_ago"] = teams_wins_2["W"] / teams_wins_2["G"]

    final_combined_games_min = final_combined_games_min.merge(teams_wins_2[["yearID", "teamID", "win_percentage_three_ago"]], on = ["yearID", "teamID"], how = "left")

    return final_combined_games_min

teams_2025 = teams[teams["yearID"] == 2025][["teamID", "W"]]

data_2025 = data_2025.merge(teams_2025, on="teamID")
data_2025.rename(columns={"W": "actual_wins"}, inplace=True)
data_2025["predicted_win_pct"] = lm_multiple.predict(data_2025)

data_2025["predicted_wins"] = data_2025["predicted_win_pct"] * 162

5 rows × 24 columns

data_2025["error"] = data_2025["predicted_wins"] - data_2025["actual_wins"]
data_2025["abs_error"] = abs(data_2025["error"])

rmse_2025 = np.sqrt(np.mean(data_2025["error"]**2))
print(rmse_2025)

7.925080596592893

def graph_predictions_wins(data, year):
    plt.figure()

    plt.scatter(
        data["predicted_wins"],
        data["actual_wins"],
        alpha=0.7
    )

    min_val = min(data["predicted_wins"].min(), data["actual_wins"].min())
    max_val = max(data["predicted_wins"].max(), data["actual_wins"].max())

    plt.plot([min_val, max_val], [min_val, max_val], linestyle="--")

    plt.xlabel("Predicted Wins")
    plt.ylabel("Actual Wins")
    plt.title(f"{year}: Predicted vs Actual Wins")

    plt.show()

def graph_residuals_wins(data, year):
    plt.figure()

    plt.scatter(
        data["predicted_wins"],
        data["residual"],
        alpha=0.7
    )

    plt.axhline(0, linestyle="--")

    plt.xlabel("Predicted Wins")
    plt.ylabel("Residual (Actual - Predicted)")
    plt.title(f"{year}: Residual Plot")

    plt.show()

graph_predictions_wins(data_2025, 2025)

def graph_predictions_wins_labeled(data, year):
    data = data.copy()
    data["residual"] = data["actual_wins"] - data["predicted_wins"]

    plt.figure()

    plt.scatter(
        data["predicted_wins"],
        data["actual_wins"],
        alpha=0.7
    )

    min_val = min(data["predicted_wins"].min(), data["actual_wins"].min())
    max_val = max(data["predicted_wins"].max(), data["actual_wins"].max())
    plt.plot([min_val, max_val], [min_val, max_val], linestyle="--")

    for _, row in data.iterrows():
        plt.text(row["predicted_wins"], row["actual_wins"], row["teamID"], fontsize=8)

    plt.xlabel("Predicted Wins")
    plt.ylabel("Actual Wins")
    plt.title(f"{year}: Predicted vs Actual Wins")
    plt.show()

graph_predictions_wins_labeled(data_2025, 2025)

def plot_comparisons(year, data_given):
    data = get_predictions(year, data_given).copy()

    # predicted wins
    data["predicted_wins"] = data["predicted_win_pct"] * data["G"]

    # residuals
    data["residual"] = data["actual_wins"] - data["predicted_wins"]

    # RMSE
    rmse = np.sqrt(np.mean(data["residual"]**2))

    # sort for nicer visualization
    data = data.sort_values("actual_wins")

    x = np.arange(len(data))
    offset = 0

    plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))

    # actual
    plt.scatter(x - offset, data["actual_wins"], label="Actual", alpha=0.8)

    # predicted
    plt.scatter(x + offset, data["predicted_wins"], label="Predicted", alpha=0.8)

    plt.xticks(x, data["teamID"], rotation=45)

    plt.ylabel("Wins")
    plt.title(f"{year}: Predicted vs Actual Wins by Team (RMSE = {rmse:.2f})")

    plt.legend()
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()

plot_comparisons(2025, data_2025)

0.04892025059625243

# aside to check what the rmse would be for data with just the previous wins,
# then one with just the previous wins/war

quick_check = final_combined_games_min.copy()[["teamID", "yearID", "G", "season", "wins_per_game", "war_per_game", "win_percentage_last"]]
#final_combined_games_min.tail()
quick_check.head()
teamID yearID G season wins_per_game war_per_game win_percentage_last
0 ML4 1975 162 1975 0.419753 0.172963 0.469136
1 OAK 1975 162 1975 0.604938 0.268457 0.555556
2 PHI 1975 162 1975 0.530864 0.184691 0.493827
3 SFN 1975 161 1975 0.496894 0.129565 0.444444
4 MIN 1975 159 1975 0.477987 0.273711 0.503067 
# fit model
lm1 = smf.ols("wins_per_game ~ win_percentage_last", data=quick_check).fit()

# predictions (still in win %)
quick_check["pred_wpct_1"] = lm1.predict(quick_check)

# RMSE in win %
rmse1_pct = np.sqrt(np.mean((quick_check["wins_per_game"] - quick_check["pred_wpct_1"])**2))

# convert to wins
rmse1_wins = rmse1_pct * 162

print(f"RMSE (win%) - baseline: {rmse1_pct:.4f}")
print(f"RMSE (wins) - baseline: {rmse1_wins:.2f}")

RMSE (win%) - baseline: 0.0622
RMSE (wins) - baseline: 10.08

# fit model
lm2 = smf.ols("wins_per_game ~ win_percentage_last + war_per_game", data=quick_check).fit()

# predictions
quick_check["pred_wpct_2"] = lm2.predict(quick_check)

# RMSE in win %
rmse2_pct = np.sqrt(np.mean((quick_check["wins_per_game"] - quick_check["pred_wpct_2"])**2))

# convert to wins
rmse2_wins = rmse2_pct * 162

print(f"RMSE (win%) - +WAR: {rmse2_pct:.4f}")
print(f"RMSE (wins) - +WAR: {rmse2_wins:.2f}")

RMSE (win%) - +WAR: 0.0600
RMSE (wins) - +WAR: 9.72

Now I'm going to try to apply the model to predict the 2026 standings. However, in order to get the raw data, I cannot use my previous information. Therefore I have to scrape data off the internet and make some adjustments in order to actually apply the model to 2026.

data_2026 = get_data_for_year(2026)
data_2026.head()

data_2026["predicted_win_pct"] = lm_multiple.predict(data_2026)

data_2026["predicted_wins"] = data_2026["predicted_win_pct"] * 162

data_2026.head()

data_2026 = get_data_for_year(2026)
data_2026.head()

0 rows × 22 columns

get_war_wins_for_year(2026)
teamID WAR yearID W G war_per_game wins_per_game season 
 

def get_war_data_for_prediction_year(year):
    players = get_player_IDs_2026(year)
    war_data = get_previous_war(year, players).copy()

    teams = pd.read_csv("Teams.csv")
    teams_prev = teams[["yearID", "teamID", "G"]].copy()
    teams_prev["yearID"] = teams_prev["yearID"] + 1

    war_data["yearID"] = year

    war_data = war_data.merge(
        teams_prev[["yearID", "teamID", "G"]],
        on=["yearID", "teamID"],
        how="left"
    )

    war_data["war_per_game"] = war_data["WAR"] / war_data["G"]

    return war_data

war_data_2026 = war_data[war_data["yearID"] == 2026]

war_data_2026.head()
name_common mlb_ID playerID yearID team_ID stint_ID lg_ID pitcher G PA salary runs_above_avg runs_above_avg_off runs_above_avg_def WAR_rep WAA WAR
226 CJ Abrams 682928.0 abramcj01 2026 WSN 1 NL N 20 87.0 NaN 8.7 10.7 -0.8 0.28 0.85 1.13
293 Wilyer Abreu 677800.0 abreuwi02 2026 BOS 1 AL N 19 79.0 NaN 8.9 3.9 4.4 0.25 0.94 1.19
390 Luisangel Acuña 682668.0 acunajo01 2026 CHW 1 AL N 18 64.0 NaN -5.7 -3.7 -1.3 0.21 -0.56 -0.35
399 Ronald Acuña Jr. 660670.0 acunaro01 2026 ATL 1 NL N 21 95.0 NaN 0.3 -0.7 0.3 0.30 0.00 0.30
430 Willy Adames 642715.0 adamewi01 2026 SFG 1 NL N 21 90.0 NaN 4.3 3.3 2.3 0.30 0.43 0.73 
# playerID function

def get_player_IDs_2026(year):
    batting_year = war_data[war_data["yearID"] == 2026]
    pitching_year = pitch_war_data[pitch_war_data["yearID"] == 2026]
    batting_year.rename(columns={'team_ID': 'teamID'}, inplace=True)
    pitching_year.rename(columns={'team_ID': 'teamID'}, inplace=True)
    teams = pd.read_csv("Teams.csv")
    batting_year_1 = teams.copy()[teams["yearID"] == 2025]
    teams = batting_year_1["teamID"].unique()
    
    all_playerIDs = []

    for team in teams:
        playerIDs = []

        team_batters = batting_year[batting_year["teamID"] == team]
        team_pitchers = pitching_year[pitching_year["teamID"] == team]

        for i in range(len(team_batters)):
            playerID_specific = team_batters.iloc[i]["playerID"]
            all_teams_player = batting_year[batting_year["playerID"] == playerID_specific]
            total_games = all_teams_player["G"].sum()

            if (team_batters.iloc[i]["G"] > ((total_games)/2)):
                playerIDs.append(playerID_specific)

        for i in range(len(team_pitchers)):
            playerID_specific = team_pitchers.iloc[i]["playerID"]
            all_teams_player = pitching_year[pitching_year["playerID"] == playerID_specific]
            total_games = all_teams_player["G"].sum()

            if (team_pitchers.iloc[i]["G"] > ((total_games)/2)):
                playerIDs.append(playerID_specific)

        playerIDs = list(set(playerIDs))

        all_playerIDs.append(playerIDs)

    playerID_df = pd.DataFrame({"teamID": teams, "playerIDs": all_playerIDs})
    
    return playerID_df

def get_data_for_year_2026(year):
    war_data_year = get_war_data_for_prediction_year(year)
    teams = pd.read_csv("Teams.csv")
    teams_wins = teams.copy()[["yearID", "teamID", "W", "G"]]

    teams_wins_last_year = teams_wins.copy()

    teams_wins_last_year["yearID"] = teams_wins_last_year["yearID"] + 1

    teams_wins_last_year["win_percentage_last"] = teams_wins_last_year["W"] / teams_wins_last_year["G"]

    year_data_1 = war_data_year.merge(teams_wins_last_year[["yearID", "teamID", "win_percentage_last"]], on = ["yearID", "teamID"], how = "left")
    OPS_data_year = apply_stat_function_over_years(get_previous_batting_percentage_stat, "OPS", year, year, use_2026_players=True)
    OPS_data_year = OPS_data_year.rename(columns={'OPS': 'combined_OPS'})
    BA_data_year = apply_stat_function_over_years(get_previous_batting_percentage_stat, "BA", year, year, use_2026_players=True)
    BA_data_year = BA_data_year.rename(columns={'BA': 'combined_BA'})
    HR_data_year = apply_stat_function_over_years(get_previous_batting_counting_stat, "HR", year, year, use_2026_players=True)
    HR_data_year = HR_data_year.rename(columns={'HR': 'combined_HR'})
    X2B_data_year = apply_stat_function_over_years(get_previous_batting_counting_stat, "2B", year, year, use_2026_players=True)
    X2B_data_year = X2B_data_year.rename(columns={'2B': 'combined_2B'})
    BB_data_year = apply_stat_function_over_years(get_previous_batting_counting_stat, "BB", year, year, use_2026_players=True)
    BB_data_year = BB_data_year.rename(columns={'BB': 'combined_BB'})
    R_data_year = apply_stat_function_over_years(get_previous_batting_counting_stat, "R", year, year, use_2026_players=True)
    R_data_year = R_data_year.rename(columns={'R': 'combined_R'})
    combined = year_data_1.merge(OPS_data_year, on=["teamID", "yearID"], how="inner")
    combined = combined.merge(BA_data_year, on=["teamID", "yearID"], how="inner")
    combined = combined.merge(HR_data_year, on=["teamID", "yearID"], how="inner")
    combined = combined.merge(X2B_data_year, on=["teamID", "yearID"], how="inner")
    combined = combined.merge(BB_data_year, on=["teamID", "yearID"], how="inner")
    combined = combined.merge(R_data_year, on=["teamID", "yearID"], how="inner")

    team_stats = teams.copy()[["yearID", "teamID", "W", "G", "R", "RA", "H", "HR", "ERA"]]

    team_stats["yearID"] = team_stats["yearID"] + 1

    team_stats["R_per_game_last"] = team_stats["R"] / team_stats["G"]
    team_stats["RA_per_game_last"] = team_stats["RA"] / team_stats["G"]
    team_stats["H_per_game_last"] = team_stats["H"] / team_stats["G"]
    team_stats["HR_per_game_last"] = team_stats["HR"] / team_stats["G"]
    team_stats["ERA_last"] = team_stats["ERA"]

    final_combined = combined.merge(team_stats[["yearID", "teamID", "R_per_game_last", "RA_per_game_last", "H_per_game_last", "HR_per_game_last", "ERA_last"]], on = ["yearID", "teamID"], how = "left")

    final_combined_games_min = final_combined.copy()[final_combined["G"] >= 100]

    # now I'm going to add the last two years totals to see if they are helpful... 

    teams_wins = teams.copy()[["yearID", "teamID", "W", "G"]]

    teams_wins["yearID"] = teams_wins["yearID"] + 2

    teams_wins["win_percentage_two_ago"] = teams_wins["W"] / teams_wins["G"]

    final_combined_games_min = final_combined_games_min.merge(teams_wins[["yearID", "teamID", "win_percentage_two_ago"]], on = ["yearID", "teamID"], how = "left")


    teams_wins_2 = teams.copy()[["yearID", "teamID", "W", "G"]]

    teams_wins_2["yearID"] = teams_wins["yearID"] + 3

    teams_wins_2["win_percentage_three_ago"] = teams_wins_2["W"] / teams_wins_2["G"]

    final_combined_games_min = final_combined_games_min.merge(teams_wins_2[["yearID", "teamID", "win_percentage_three_ago"]], on = ["yearID", "teamID"], how = "left")

    return final_combined_games_min

TypeError: apply_stat_function_over_years() got an unexpected keyword argument 'use_2026_players'
def apply_stat_function_over_years(stat_function, stat, start_year, end_year, use_2026_players=False):
    dfs = []

    for year in range(start_year, end_year + 1):
        if use_2026_players:
            players = get_player_IDs_2026(year)
        else:
            players = get_player_IDs(year)

        year_df = stat_function(stat, year, players)
        dfs.append(year_df)

    return pd.concat(dfs, ignore_index=True)

data_2026 = get_data_for_year_2026(2026)
data_2026.head()

teams_df.tail()
checking = war_data.copy()[war_data["yearID"] == 2025]

print(checking['team_ID'].unique())
# CHA, CHN, KCA, LAN, NYA, NYN, SDN, SFN, SLN, TBA, WAS

['PHI' 'WSN' 'HOU' 'BOS' 'MIA' 'NYM' 'ATL' 'SFG' 'BAL' 'LAA' 'COL' 'TEX'
 'CHC' 'ARI' 'ATH' 'CHW' 'CIN' 'TBR' 'STL' 'CLE' 'SEA' 'SDP' 'MIL' 'KCR'
 'DET' 'MIN' 'PIT' 'LAD' 'TOR' 'NYY']

id_map = {
    "CHA": "CHW",  # White Sox
    "CHN": "CHC",  # Cubs
    "KCA": "KCR",  # Royals
    "LAN": "LAD",  # Dodgers
    "NYA": "NYY",  # Yankees
    "NYN": "NYM",  # Mets
    "SDN": "SDP",  # Padres
    "SFN": "SFG",  # Giants
    "SLN": "STL",  # Cardinals
    "TBA": "TBR",  # Rays
    "WAS": "WSN"   # Nationals
}

teams["teamID"] = teams["teamID"].replace(id_map)

teams.to_csv("Teams.csv", index=False)

# now I'm going to try again

data_2026 = get_data_for_year_2026(2026)
data_2026.head()

data_2026.loc[data_2026["teamID"] == "ATH", "win_percentage_two_ago"] = 0.425926
data_2026.loc[data_2026["teamID"] == "ATH", "win_percentage_three_ago"] = 0.308642

data_2026["predicted_win_pct"] = lm_multiple.predict(data_2026)

data_2026["predicted_wins"] = data_2026["predicted_win_pct"] * 162

predicted_standings = data_2026.copy()[["teamID", "predicted_wins"]]

predicted_standings.to_csv("Predicted_Standings.csv", index=False)

def plot_scatter_2026(data):
    # last year's wins
    data["last_year_wins"] = data["win_percentage_last"] * 162

    plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))

    plt.scatter(
        data["last_year_wins"],
        data["predicted_wins"],
        alpha=0.8
    )

    # reference line (no change from last year)
    min_val = min(data["last_year_wins"].min(), data["predicted_wins"].min())
    max_val = max(data["last_year_wins"].max(), data["predicted_wins"].max())

    plt.plot([min_val, max_val], [min_val, max_val], linestyle="--")

    plt.xlabel("2025 Wins")
    plt.ylabel("Predicted 2026 Wins")
    plt.title("2026 Predictions vs 2025 Wins")

    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()

def plot_team_comparison_2026(data):
    data = data.copy()

    # compute last year wins
    data["last_year_wins"] = data["win_percentage_last"] * 162

    # sort for readability
    data = data.sort_values("predicted_wins")

    x = np.arange(len(data))
    offset = 0

    plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))

    # last year
    plt.scatter(x - offset, data["last_year_wins"], label="2025 Wins", alpha=0.8)

    # predicted
    plt.scatter(x + offset, data["predicted_wins"], label="Predicted 2026 Wins", alpha=0.8)

    plt.xticks(x, data["teamID"], rotation=45)

    plt.ylabel("Wins")
    plt.title("Team-by-Team: 2025 vs Predicted 2026 Wins")

    plt.legend()
    plt.tight_layout()
    for i in range(len(data)):
        plt.plot(
            [x[i] - offset, x[i] + offset],
            [data["last_year_wins"].iloc[i], data["predicted_wins"].iloc[i]],
            alpha=0.3
        )
    plt.show()

plot_scatter_2026(data_2026)

plot_team_comparison_2026(data_2026)
